mapper.sql: SELECT a.id, a.resume_id, a.overall_score, a.content_score, a.structure_score, a.skill_match_score, a.expression_score, a.project_score, a.summary, a.strengths_json, a.suggestions_json, a.analyzed_at, r.id AS r_id, r.file_hash AS r_file_hash, r.original_filename AS r_original_filename, r.file_size AS r_file_size, r.content_type AS r_content_type, r.storage_key AS r_storage_key, r.storage_url AS r_storage_url, r.resume_text AS r_resume_text, r.uploaded_at AS r_uploaded_at, r.last_accessed_at AS r_last_accessed_at, r.access_count AS r_access_count, r.analyze_status AS r_analyze_status, r.analyze_error AS r_analyze_error FROM resume_analyses a JOIN resumes r ON r.id = a.resume_id
mapper.select: WHERE a.resume_id = #{resumeId} ORDER BY a.analyzed_at DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO resume_analyses ( resume_id, overall_score, content_score, structure_score, skill_match_score, expression_score, project_score, summary, strengths_json, suggestions_json, analyzed_at ) VALUES ( #{entity.resume.id}, #{entity.overallScore}, #{entity.contentScore}, #{entity.structureScore}, #{entity.skillMatchScore}, #{entity.expressionScore}, #{entity.projectScore}, #{entity.summary}, #{entity.strengthsJson}, #{entity.suggestionsJson}, COALESCE(#{entity.analyzedAt}, NOW()) )
mapper.update: UPDATE resume_analyses SET resume_id = #{entity.resume.id}, overall_score = #{entity.overallScore}, content_score = #{entity.contentScore}, structure_score = #{entity.structureScore}, skill_match_score = #{entity.skillMatchScore}, expression_score = #{entity.expressionScore}, project_score = #{entity.projectScore}, summary = #{entity.summary}, strengths_json = #{entity.strengthsJson}, suggestions_json = #{entity.suggestionsJson}, analyzed_at = #{entity.analyzedAt} WHERE id = #{entity.id}
